name: CourtListener / Free Law Project
notes: Preferred first source for real case metadata, opinions, clusters, courts, citation relationships, and RECAP-linked public materials where legally available. Confirm current API terms and attribution rules before production ingestion.

name: Harvard Caselaw Access Project
notes: Potential second source for historical case law. Verify current access, licensing, and redistribution terms before use.

name: Justia
notes: Useful as a public source link and fallback metadata source. Do not copy full text unless terms clearly permit.

name: California Courts Self-Help Guide
notes: Official court self-help guidance and forms. Prefer linking to canonical pages with jurisdiction and topic metadata.

name: Y Combinator Documents
notes: Canonical public startup financing templates. Track version/source URL and verify terms before storing template text.
